clue: Best scrambled tofu, with beef crust
explanation: OUTFOX: best. OX (beef) crust (goes around) scrambled TOFU.
hints: We need a short word for beef.
That word will form a crust. That is to say, it will go outside the rest of the wordplay.
We can get the rest of our letters by scrambling TOFU.
Our answer will be a word meaning (to) best.
